response.overview: This Musical remake of Zombie Prom is a play that follows Jonny, a high school student who returns from a nuclear waste dump as a teenage zombie. When he tries to rekindle his relationship with his high school sweetheart, Toffee, their love faces opposition from the school principal, Miss Delilah Strict. The play is set in the atomic 1950s and features original songs in the style of 50s hits.
response.title: Zombie Prom-The Musical
